Class StatementMapper.UpsertSpec

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.r2dbc.core.StatementMapper.UpsertSpec
Enclosing interface:
StatementMapper
public static class StatementMapper.UpsertSpec extends Object
UPSERT specification.
Since:
4.1
Author:
Christoph Strobl
